leadText: Glaceon (Japanese: グレイシア Glacia) is an Ice-type Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. It evolves from Eevee when leveled up near an Ice Rock or when exposed to an Ice Stone. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.) It is one of Eevee's final forms, the others being Vaporeon, Jolteon, Flareon, Espeon, Umbreon, Leafeon, and Sylveon.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Glaceon creating powdery snow Glaceon is a quadrupedal, mammalian Pokémon covered in light-blue fur. It has long, pointed ears, dark eyes, and a small nose. A teal crest with two dangling flaps adorns its head, resembling hair or headgear. Glaceon has two dark blue, rhombus-shaped markings on its back; the tip of its tail, feet, and flaps are the same shade of blue. By quickly lowering its body temperature to −75 °F (−60 °C), Glaceon can freeze its fur into needle-sharp icicles that it can fire. This is used for a number of purposes, such as self-defense, tackling prey, or staying safe while it sleeps. [ 1 ] Doing so also lets it instantly freeze the moisture in the atmosphere with just a single cry to create small ice crystals and a flurry of diamond dust or ice pellets at its food. The diamond dust is noted to be gem-like in nature and glitters as it flutters around. Those captivated by Glaceon's beautiful snowfall will be frozen without realizing it. It is popular in ski resorts for its ability to create powdery snow from the coldness it generates. Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Glaceon evolves from Eevee . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Eevee Normal → First Evolution Glaceon Ice ↑ Sleep Style Dex

Generation IV Sinnoh Pt : #170 Johto #— Diamond As a protective technique, it can completely freeze its fur to make its hairs stand like needles. Pearl Platinum By controlling its body heat, it can freeze the atmosphere around it to make a diamond-dust flurry. HeartGold It causes small ice crystals to form by lowering the temperature of the surrounding atmosphere. SoulSilver Generation V Unova B2 W2 : #098 Black By controlling its body heat, it can freeze the atmosphere around it to make a diamond-dust flurry. White Black 2 It lowers its body heat to freeze its fur. The hairs then become like needles it can fire. White 2 Generation VI Central Kalos #— Coastal Kalos #084 Mountain Kalos #— Hoenn #— X By controlling its body heat, it can freeze the atmosphere around it to make a diamond-dust flurry. Y It lowers its body heat to freeze its fur. The hairs then become like needles it can fire. Omega Ruby By controlling its body heat, it can freeze the atmosphere around it to make a diamond-dust flurry. Alpha Sapphire It lowers its body heat to freeze its fur. The hairs then become like needles it can fire. Generation VII Alola S M : #130 Alola US UM : #160 Kanto #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee! . Sun It can control its body temperature at will. This enables it to freeze the moisture in the atmosphere, creating flurries of diamond dust. Moon It freezes its fur into icicles, spiky and sharp, and tackles its prey. Ultra Sun It protects itself by freezing its fur into sharp needles. It can drop its body temperature below –75 degrees Fahrenheit . Ultra Moon It can instantaneously freeze any moisture that's around it, creating ice pellets to shoot at its prey. Generation VIII Galar #203 Isle of Armor #— Crown Tundra #080 Sinnoh #— Hisui #032 Sword Any who become captivated by the beauty of the snowfall that Glaceon creates will be frozen before they know it. Shield The coldness emanating from Glaceon causes powdery snow to form, making it quite a popular Pokémon at ski resorts. Brilliant Diamond As a defense mechanism, it can completely freeze its fur to make its hairs stand out like needles. Shining Pearl Legends: Arceus Glaceon is able to lower its body temperature very quickly. It freezes the atmosphere, creating diamond dust that glitters like gems while it flutters and dances around. Generation IX Paldea #186 Kitakami #— Blueberry #— Lumiose #107 Hyperspace #— Scarlet It can control its body temperature at will. This enables it to freeze the moisture in the atmosphere, creating flurries of diamond dust. Violet It lowers its body heat to freeze its fur. The hairs then become like needles it can fire. Legends: Z-A By controlling its body heat, it can freeze the atmosphere around it to make a diamond-dust flurry. Spin-off games Pokopia #287 Pokopia It can control its body temperature at will. This enables it to freeze the moisture in the atmosphere, creating flurries of diamond dust. Pokémon Sleep Sleep type : Slumbering Pokémon type: Ice Points to befriend : 20 Specialty: Skills Berry: Rawst Berry ×1 Primary ingredient : Moomoo Milk ×1 Possible ingredients : Moomoo Milk Soothing Cacao Bean Sausage Main skill : Cooking Power-Up S Base carry limit: 12 Gives your pot room for 7 more ingredients next time you cook. At first glance it may look defenseless as it dozes, but look closer. Glaceon completely freezes its fur, making its hairs stand out like needles, so that it's protected from enemies even while it sleeps. Arm-Pillow Sleep Sturdy Sleep Sprawled Sleep Atop-Belly Sleep ★ ★★★★ ★★ ★★★ ★★★ ★★ ★★★★ ★ Costumes in Pokémon GO Flower crown Undersea Holiday Holiday hat Cherry blossoms Explorer hat Evolution data [ edit | edit source ] Glaceon evolves from Eevee when exposed to an Ice Rock or, from Generation VIII onwards, when exposed to an Ice Stone . Eevee will always evolve into Glaceon when leveled up near an Ice Rock, even if the evolutionary conditions for it to evolve into Espeon , Umbreon , or Sylveon have also been met. The Ice Rock is not present in Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver , so Eevee cannot evolve into Glaceon in these games, as well as Pokémon Sword and Shield and Pokémon Scarlet and Violet , although Eevee can evolve into Glaceon with the Ice Stone in these games instead. The Ice Stone is not obtainable in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl , so Eevee can only evolve into Glaceon with the Ice Rock. Eevee will never evolve into Glaceon in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee! , as Glaceon is not present in those games. Unevolved Eevee Normal Ice Stone → + Level up near Ice Rock First Evolution Glaceon Ice Sprites [ edit | edit source ] This Pokémon was unavailable prior to Generation IV. Generation IV Diamond Pearl Platinum HeartGold SoulSilver Front Back Front Back Front Back Generation V Black White Black 2 White 2 Front Back Front Back Generation VI X Y Omega Ruby Alpha Sapphire Front Back Front Back Generation VII Sun Moon Ultra Sun Ultra Moon Front Back Front Back Generation VIII Sword Shield Legends: Arceus Cross-Generation HOME For other sprites and images, please see Glaceon images on the Bulbagarden Archives .

Brilliant Diamond As a defense mechanism, it can completely freeze its fur to make its hairs stand out like needles. Shining Pearl Legends: Arceus Glaceon is able to lower its body temperature very quickly. It freezes the atmosphere, creating diamond dust that glitters like gems while it flutters and dances around. Generation IX Paldea #186 Kitakami #— Blueberry #— Lumiose #107 Hyperspace #— Scarlet It can control its body temperature at will. This enables it to freeze the moisture in the atmosphere, creating flurries of diamond dust. Violet It lowers its body heat to freeze its fur. The hairs then become like needles it can fire. Legends: Z-A By controlling its body heat, it can freeze the atmosphere around it to make a diamond-dust flurry. Spin-off games Pokopia #287 Pokopia It can control its body temperature at will. This enables it to freeze the moisture in the atmosphere, creating flurries of diamond dust. Glaceon in the Alola Pokédex S M Glaceon in the Alola Pokédex US UM Glaceon in the Paldea Pokédex

sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry DP076 Glaceon Dawn's Pokédex Glaceon, the Fresh Snow Pokémon and the evolved form of Eevee . Glaceon can freeze the fur on its body, and make it stick out like sharp needles. Episode Pokémon Source Entry BW102 Glaceon Ash's Pokédex Glaceon, the Fresh Snow Pokémon. Glaceon freezes the surrounding air by controlling its body temperature. Episode Pokémon Source Entry JN087 Glaceon Chloe's Rotom Phone Glaceon, the Fresh Snow Pokémon. An Ice-type . One of Eevee's evolved forms , Glaceon can control its body temperature at will, and by freezing water particles in the air, it can create diamond dust .
